twc_daily.narrative: Morning clouds followed by afternoon sun. Highs in the mid 80s and lows in the low 70s.
Clouds giving way to sun . Highs in the upper 80s and lows in the low 70s.
Afternoon showers and thunderstorms. Potential for severe thunderstorms. Highs in the upper 70s and lows in the upper 50s.
Morning showers and thunderstorms. Highs in the mid 70s and lows in the upper 50s.
Showers. Highs in the mid 60s and lows in the low 50s.
Cloudy with rain. Highs in the low 60s and lows in the low 50s.
Showers ending by midday. Highs in the upper 60s and lows in the upper 40s.
